name: Glazed Cauliflower with Ginger
recipeInstructions:
1. Separate the cauliflower into florets. Wash well and drain.
2. Heat 3 tablespoons oil over high heat in a skillet.
3. When very hot, add coriander seeds and fry for 10 seconds.
4. Add ginger and chilies, and stir for a couple of seconds.
5. Immediately add turmeric and salt. Follow immediately with the cauliflower.
6. Stir rapidly to prevent burning and distribute the spices evenly.
7. Add 1/4 cup hot water. Reduce heat, cover, and cook for 20 to 25 minutes, stirring once or twice during cooking.
8. Increase heat to medium and stir-fry to evaporate remaining moisture and lightly brown the cauliflower, 5 to 10 minutes. Stir carefully.
9. If the vegetable looks dry, stir in the remaining oil.
10. Add lemon juice and cilantro leaves. Serve immediately.
